Highly recommended books on Philosophy read by me!

15 Jun 2021 | Books

The Bhagavad Gita or Divine Song

  • Buy on Amazon

Shaivism

  • Amritānubhava : Jnaneshvar Translation by Swami Abhayananda - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Lord Śiva’s Song: The Īśvara Gītā - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Shri Shiva Rahasya PDF

  • Bhaṭṭa Rāmakaṇṭha’s commentary on the Kiraṇatantra Volume 1, Chapters 1-6, translation by Dominic Goodall PDF

  • Śvetāśvatara Upaniṣad translation by Śwāmi Tyāgīśānanda - Buy on Amazon, PDF

Kashmir Shaivism (Trika Philosophy)

  • Essence of the Exact Reality or Paramārthasāra of Abhinavagupta with English translation and notes by Dr. B.N. Pandit - PDF

  • Siva Sutras The yoga of Supreme Identity - Text of the Sutras and the Commentary Vimarsini of Ksemaraja Translated into English with Introduction, Notes, Running Exposition, Glossary and Index by Jaidev Singh - Buy on Amazon

  • Shiva Sutras “The Supreme Awakening” with the commentary of Kshemaraja Revealed by Swami Lakshmanjoo - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Tantrasāra of Abhinavagupta Translated from Sanskrit with Introduction and Notes by H.N. Chakravarty - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Vijñāna Bhairava: The Manual for Self-Realization Revealed by Swami Lakshmanjoo - Buy on Amazon

  • Spanda-Kārikās: The Divine Creative Pulsation; the Kārikās and the Spanda-nirṇaya Translated into English by Jaideva Singh - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Stavacintāmaṇi of Bhaṭṭa Nārāyaṇa with the Commentary by Kṣemarāja translation Boris Marjanovic - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • The Doctrine of Vibration - An Analysis of the Doctrines and Practices of Kashmir Shaivism - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • A Trident of Wisdom Translation of Parātrīsíkā-vivaraṇa - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • श्रीतन्त्रालोकः हिन्दीभाष्यकारः सम्पादकश्च डॉ. परमहंसमिश्रः “हंसः” - PDF

  • The Ubiquitous Śiva - Somānanda’s Śivadṛṣṭi and His Tantric Interlocutors John Nemec - Buy on Amazon

  • The Triadic Heart of Siva - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Light On Tantra In Kashmir Shaivism : Abhinavagupta’s Tantraloka Chapter One - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Shivastotravali of Acharya Utpaladeva - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • शिवदृष्टिः सम्पादकः डॉ० राधेश्याम चतुर्वेदी - PDF

  • Lallā-Vākyāni or The Wise Sayings of Lal Ded - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Bhāvopahāra of Cakrapāṇinātha with the Vivaraṇaof Ramyadevabhaṭṭa tr. E. Garzilli - PDF

Advaita Vedanta

  • Changadev Pasashti : Jnaneshvar Translation by Swami Abhayananda - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Katha Upanishad translation Swami Gambhirananda - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Ashtavakra Samhita Translation by Swami Nityaswarupananda PDF

  • Select Works of Sri Sankaracharya - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Dṛg-Dṛśya Vivēka translation Swami Nikhilananda - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Laghu-yoga-vasistha translation by K. Narayanasvami Aiyar - Buy on Amazon, PDF, Read online

Swami Vivekananda

  • Raja Yoga - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Lectures from Colombo to Almora - Buy on Amazon, PDF

Ramana Maharshi

  • Sri Maharshi’s Way, translation of Upadesa Saram by D. M. Sastri - Buy on Amazon, PDF

Nisargadatta Maharaj

  • I Am That - Buy on Amazon, PDF

Others

  • The Red Book - Liber Novus by C.G. Jung (Not a philosophy book) - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Meditations by Marcus Aurelius - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • Siddhartha : An Indian Tale by Herman Hesse - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • The Kybalion - A Study of the Hermetic Philosophy of Ancient Egypt and Greece - Buy on Amazon, PDF

  • The Celestine Prophecy - Buy on Amazon, PDF

Papers

  • Tantric Alchemy of the Soul: A Philosophical Analysis and Synthesis of Jung and Kashmir Shaivism PDF

  • Abhinavagupta on Reflection (Pratibimba) in the Tantrāloka PDF
